description: A screenshot of a social-media post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump' and a profile picture showing a face overlaid with a U.S. flag pattern. The black-on-white text reacts to a senator's reported statement that 'NOBODY RESPECTS BORDER PATROL OR ICE', calling it egregious and demanding an apology, signed 'President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump; @realDonaldTrump; NOBODY RESPECTS BORDER PATROL OR ICE
